title: anisolotus wrangeliana
intro: Anisolotus wrangeliana, also known as Angelica or Queen of Angels, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anisolotus wrangeliana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in cooking and as a garnish, although its most common form of preparation is in tea or tincture form.
